word: H8212 - שׇׁפְכָה - shophkâh - shof-kaw' - Privy member

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפכה

Transliteration: shophkâh

Phonetic: shof-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. penis, urethra, male organ
    1. as fluid duct

Origin: a derivative from H8210

TWOT entry: 2444b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
